scope: wave2 fan-out migration: only the 'organizations' stream is Tier-1 expressible; the 3 organization-scoped legacy streams (organization_networks, organization_devices, organization_admins) require a list-organizations-then-fan-out-per-organization read pattern this dialect cannot express declaratively (see docs.md and the reported ENGINE_GAP blocker) and are NOT implemented in this bundle — legacy internal/connectors/cisco-meraki remains authoritative for those 3 streams.

excluded.reason: org-scoped sub-resource fan-out read (list organizations, then read this endpoint per organization id) has no Tier-1 declarative expression in this dialect; ENGINE_GAP blocker reported, legacy stays authoritative for this stream
